new_classes.label_en: PDO Still Wine in Containers of More Than 2 Litres with High Actual Alcoholic Strength (CN 22042938)
new_classes.label_de: g.U.-Stillwein in Behältnissen von mehr als 2 Litern mit hohem tatsächlichem Alkoholgehalt (KN 22042938)
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes with a protected designation of origin (PDO), presented in containers of more than 2 litres, with a high actual alcoholic strength, classified under CN subheading 22042938 (Chapter 22). See additional note 6(a) to Chapter 22.

coverage_explanation: The legal note establishes that CN codes 22042922–22042978 cover still wines with a PDO in containers of more than 2 litres, and that subheadings within this range are further discriminated by actual alcoholic strength per additional note 6(a) of Chapter 22. The axioms capture: (1) PDO quality via hasGeographicOriginQuality someValuesFrom ProtectedDesignationOfOrigin, (2) container size > 2 L via decimalRange minExclusive 2, and (3) code identity via codeString hasValue "22042938". The precise alcoholic strength threshold defined in additional note 6(a) (the numeric boundary distinguishing 22042938 from sibling codes such as 22042932, 22042942, etc.) is not available in the provided legal text, so the alcoholic strength range restriction cannot be precisely encoded. Coverage is partial on this dimension.
